description: Local repository graph, LSP-backed impact, Health, dependencies, duplicates and architecture.
name: io.github.sergii-ziborov/weavatrix

environmentVariables.description: Optional semantic precision mode: lsp (default) uses the bundled bounded TypeScript/JavaScript language-server overlay; off keeps parser-only graphs
environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_PRECISION

environmentVariables.description: Optional semantic prewarm budget: bounded (default) keeps fast startup; full explicitly queries every eligible JS/TS target within hard resource ceilings
environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_PRECISION_PREWARM

environmentVariables.description: Optional explicit permission for verified_change to run requested test/check/verify package.json scripts; must be exactly 1
environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_ALLOW_TEST_RUNS

packageArguments.description: Absolute path to the initial Git repository; open_repo can explicitly switch local repositories
Local profile (offline or pinned) or exact comma-separated local groups graph,search,source,health,build,retarget,crossrepo
